Dear Taka,

How was your pilgrimage to the land of K-pop?

14 days without me seemed to pass in a breeze — but I'm just at home, wheezing...

Hope you had fun and welcome back.

Now that you've had your fun, you're back to being a boyfriend. You now owe me many dates.

xoxo, Ami
